description: Style Note This season's french connection line features bold in bags with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift   to your season wardrobe.  Product Details Black bag with two short handles Has a zipper and a flap pocket in the front One main zipped compartment with a fabric inner and a zipped pocket Material and Care Polyurethane Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size  Height: 31 cm  Width: 40 cm  Depth: 15 cm
